result.stdout:
Description:
  C# script for brute forcing the DVWA high-security login page.

Usage:
  DVWA-BruteForce-HighSecurity [options]

Options:
  --username <username>               The username to use for the login attempts. [default: admin]
  --url <url>                         The URL of the login page. [default: http://localhost:3000/vulnerabilities/brute/]
  --phpSessId <phpSessId> (REQUIRED)  The PHP Session Id to include with the request headers. This can be found by using browser DevTools and inspecting the cookies set by DVWA.
  --passwordList <passwordList>       The absolute path to a password list file (TXT or CSV). If no file is specified, a default password list is used.
  --version                           Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information
